sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ngai un! Jesuh’ hong sapna aw, “Tuni kua in nasem ding?
Lote au khin anlak hunzo,
Tangte kua in kaikhawm ding?”
Topa’n tu’n zong hong sam lai hi, Thaman tampi hong lui
hi;
Kua in dawng ding lungdam takin: “Topa aw, kei hong sawl in.”

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Tuipi
galna kai zawh loh hang, Lawki gam na pai lah zong;
Na kong biang ah na huh theih dang, Na kiang nai
zong om theizaw;
Van mi bang na pau thei kei zong, Jesuh’ hong itna gen aw;
Paul bang thu na
hilh thei kei zong, Topa hong si hi, ci aw.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Zion kulhpi sang tung panin, Galvilna hi zolo
zong;
Na hilh thei lo zong van lami, nuntakna na lui lah zong;
Thungetna le sumpite tawh, vantung
deihna sem thei ding;
Kamsangpa’ khutte a domto, Aaron bang na hi thei
ding.

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: Mihingte a sih laitakin, Topa’n nang hong samlai hi;
“Bangmah ka
sem thei kei” ci-in, Thadah kampau khia kei in;
Hong sawl peuh lungdam tak sem in, Thu nuamtakin
semta in;
Dawng pah in, a hong sap cinagin “Topa aw, kei hong sawl in.”
